sentence: 这位体育评论员解说得很精彩。
pinyin: Zhè wèi tǐyù pínglùnyuán jiěshuō de hěn jīngcǎi.
english: This sports commentator gives excellent commentary.

meaning: To check in; To board a plane
sentence: 请旅客提前半小时前往登机口登机。
pinyin: Qǐng lǚkè tíqián bàn xiǎoshí qiánwǎng dēngjī kǒu dēngjī.
english: Passengers are asked to proceed to the boarding gate to board half an hour in advance.

sentence: 作家把手稿寄给了出版社。
pinyin: Zuòjiā bǎ shǒugǎo jì gěi le chūbǎnshè.
english: The author sent the manuscript to the publisher.

sentence: 他下载了一个开源软件包。
pinyin: Tā xiàzài le yī gè kāiyuán ruǎnjiànbāo.
english: He downloaded an open-source software package.

sentence: 这款传感器利用了光电效应。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chuángǎnqì lìyòng le guāngdiàn xiàoyìng.
english: This sensor makes use of the photoelectric effect.

sentence: 退休后他靠社会保障金生活。
pinyin: Tuìxiū hòu tā kào shèhuì bǎozhàng jīn shēnghuó.
english: After retirement, he lives on social security benefits.

sentence: 每届政府都会调整外交政策。
pinyin: Měi jiè zhèngfǔ dōu huì tiáozhěng wàijiāo zhèngcè.
english: Every administration adjusts its foreign policy.

meaning: be involved in a crash; (have an) accident
sentence: 那架飞机在海上失事了。
pinyin: Nà jià fēijī zài hǎi shàng shīshì le.
english: That airplane crashed over the sea.

sentence: 他的医保已经交满一年了。
pinyin: Tā de yī bǎo yǐjīng jiāo mǎn yī nián le.
english: His medical insurance has already been paid for a full year.

sentence: 客户刚发来一张定单。
pinyin: Kèhù gāng fā lái yī zhāng dìng dān.
english: The client just sent over an order.

sentence: 被告人当庭拒绝认罪。
pinyin: Bèigào rén dāngtíng jùjué rèn zuì.
english: The defendant refused to plead guilty in court.

sentence: 比赛的结局真的很戏剧性。
pinyin: Bǐsài de jiéjú zhēn de hěn xìjù xìng.
english: The ending of the match was truly dramatic.

sentence: 她买了一辆银色的自行车。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī liàng yínsè de zìxíngchē.
english: She bought a silver bicycle.

sentence: 这位射手每次都能射中靶心。
pinyin: Zhè wèi shèshǒu měi cì dōu néng shèzhòng bǎxīn.
english: This archer hits the bullseye every time.

meaning: 1. to take pity on; 2. pity; 3. mercy
sentence: 他对流浪猫充满怜悯。
pinyin: Tā duì liúlàng māo chōngmǎn liánmǐn.
english: He feels great pity for stray cats.

sentence: 他穿了一件蓝白条纹的衬衫。
pinyin: Tā chuān le yī jiàn lán bái tiáowén de chènshān.
english: He wore a blue and white striped shirt.

sentence: 游客们在神庙前拍了很多照片。
pinyin: Yóukè men zài shénmiào qián pāi le hěn duō zhàopiàn.
english: The tourists took many photos in front of the temple.

sentence: 这张图片的像素太低了，看不清楚。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng túpiàn de xiàngsù tài dī le, kàn bù qīngchǔ.
english: This image has too low a pixel count to see clearly.

sentence: 科学家已经找到了这次疫情的病原。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā yǐjīng zhǎodào le zhè cì yìqíng de bìngyuán.
english: Scientists have already identified the pathogen behind this outbreak.

meaning: 1. to turn over (when lying); 2. (fig.) to free oneself; 3. to emancip
sentence: 宝宝学会翻身了，妈妈很开心。
pinyin: Bǎobao xuéhuì fānshēn le, māma hěn kāixīn.
english: The baby learned to roll over, and Mom was thrilled.

sentence: 她从小就对自然科学很感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù duì zìrán kēxué hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: She has been interested in natural sciences since childhood.

sentence: 打印机里的纸张用完了。
pinyin: Dǎyìnjī lǐ de zhǐzhāng yòng wán le.
english: The paper in the printer has run out.

sentence: 村民们一起修筑了一条新路。
pinyin: Cūnmín men yīqǐ xiūzhù le yī tiáo xīn lù.
english: The villagers together built a new road.

meaning: 1. to send information using electronic means (such as fax, telegram,
sentence: 他通过电传把文件发给了对方。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò diànchuán bǎ wénjiàn fā gěi le duìfāng.
english: He sent the document to the other party by fax.

sentence: 程序自动抓取了网页上的数据。
pinyin: Chéngxù zìdòng zhuāqǔ le wǎngyè shàng de shùjù.
english: The program automatically scraped data from the webpage.

meaning: 1. pipeline; 2. general term for pipes, cables etc
sentence: 工人正在地下铺设新的管线。
pinyin: Gōngrén zhèngzài dìxià pūshè xīn de guǎnxiàn.
english: Workers are laying new pipelines underground.

sentence: 法院决定严惩那些制假售假的人。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn juédìng yán chéng nàxiē zhì jiǎ shòu jiǎ de rén.
english: The court decided to severely punish those who make and sell counterfeit goods.

sentence: 学校的南侧有一个停车场。
pinyin: Xuéxiào de nán cè yǒu yī gè tíngchēchǎng.
english: There is a parking lot on the south side of the school.

sentence: 新国王举行了隆重的登基仪式。
pinyin: Xīn guówáng jǔxíng le lóngzhòng de dēngjī yíshì.
english: The new king held a grand coronation ceremony.

sentence: 小国家不应该屈服于强权压力。
pinyin: Xiǎo guójiā bù yīnggāi qūfú yú qiángquán yālì.
english: Small countries should not yield to the pressure of powerful nations.

sentence: 在正式场合要用正确的称谓。
pinyin: Zài zhèngshì chǎnghé yào yòng zhèngquè de chēngwèi.
english: In formal settings, you should use the correct form of address.

sentence: 这双鞋的鞋底是塑胶做的。
pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié de xiédǐ shì sùjiāo zuò de.
english: The sole of this pair of shoes is made of plastic.

sentence: 城市扩张破坏了野生动物的生存环境。
pinyin: Chéngshì kuòzhāng pòhuài le yěshēng dòngwù de shēngcún huánjìng.
english: Urban expansion has destroyed the habitat of wild animals.

meaning: 1. inclinations and interests; 2. delight; 3. fun; 4. interest; 5. app
sentence: 他把阳台布置得很有情趣。
pinyin: Tā bǎ yángtái bùzhì de hěn yǒu qíngqù.
english: He decorated the balcony with a lot of charm and appeal.

sentence: 考试前她借了几本参考书来复习。
pinyin: Kǎoshì qián tā jiè le jǐ běn cānkǎo shū lái fùxí.
english: Before the exam, she borrowed a few reference books to review.

sentence: 只有亲身经历才能获得真知。
pinyin: Zhǐyǒu qīnshēn jīnglì cái néng huòdé zhēn zhī.
english: Only through personal experience can one gain real knowledge.

sentence: 我下载了一个翻译插件，用起来很方便。
pinyin: Wǒ xiàzài le yī gè fānyì chājiàn, yòng qǐlái hěn fāngbiàn.
english: I downloaded a translation plug-in and it's very convenient to use.

sentence: 村里的毛拉每天带领大家做礼拜。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de máolā měitiān dàilǐng dàjiā zuò lǐbài.
english: The village mullah leads everyone in prayer every day.

sentence: 这片森林已被列为自然保护区。
pinyin: Zhè piàn sēnlín yǐ bèi liè wéi zìrán bǎohù qū.
english: This forest has been designated a nature reserve.

meaning: 1. to refute; 2. to debunk; 3. to deny; 4. to denounce
sentence: 他在会上驳斥了对方的说法。
pinyin: Tā zài huì shàng bóchì le duìfāng de shuōfǎ.
english: He refuted the other side's claim at the meeting.

sentence: 这根柱子是实心的，很结实。
pinyin: Zhè gēn zhùzi shì shíxīn de, hěn jiēshi.
english: This pillar is solid and very sturdy.

sentence: 他们订了一个海鲜披萨外卖。
pinyin: Tāmen dìng le yī gè hǎixiān pīsà wàimài.
english: They ordered a seafood pizza for delivery.

meaning: (of a stock on the stock market) to close at (a certain price)
sentence: 今天股市报收于三千二百点。
pinyin: Jīn tiān gǔ shì bào shōu yú sān qiān èr bǎi diǎn.
english: Today the stock market closed at 3,200 points.

meaning: variant of 漁網|渔网[yu2 wang3]
sentence: 渔民早上出海，撒下鱼网等待收获。
pinyin: Yú mín zǎo shàng chū hǎi, sā xià yú wǎng děng dài shōu huò.
english: The fishermen headed out to sea in the morning, casting their nets and waiting for a catch.

sentence: 他大学读的是文史专业，毕业后当了老师。
pinyin: Tā dà xué dú de shì wén shǐ zhuān yè, bì yè hòu dāng le lǎo shī.
english: He studied literature and history at university and became a teacher after graduating.

sentence: 这家餐厅被列入了城市美食名录。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cān tīng bèi liè rù le chéng shì měi shí míng lù.
english: This restaurant has been listed in the city's food directory.

sentence: 他管孩子总喜欢用大棒政策，孩子都怕他。
pinyin: Tā guǎn hái zi zǒng xǐ huān yòng dà bàng zhèng cè, hái zi dōu pà tā.
english: He always likes to use the big stick with his kids, and they're all scared of him.

meaning: signature on letter; name of donor
sentence: 这幅字画的下款写着作者的名字和日期。
pinyin: Zhè fú zì huà de xià kuǎn xiě zhe zuò zhě de míng zi hé rì qī.
english: The signature on this calligraphy piece shows the author's name and date.

sentence: 每年夏天，城里都会举办一次艺术节。
pinyin: Měi nián xià tiān, chéng lǐ dōu huì jǔ bàn yī cì yì shù jié.
english: Every summer the city holds an arts festival.

meaning: to convert to democracy; democratic transformation
sentence: 这个国家的民主化进程经历了很多波折。
pinyin: Zhè gè guó jiā de mín zhǔ huà jìn chéng jīng lì le hěn duō bō zhé.
english: This country's democratic transformation has gone through many twists and turns.
